# constancy

> Zero-dependency immutability toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript. Five mental models — Freeze, View, Snapshot, Isolation, Verification — for choosing the right immutability tool. SLSA 3 provenance, fuzz-tested, 228+ tests, under 6 KB.

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/constancy
- GitHub: https://github.com/DungGramer/constancy
- License: MIT
- Node.js: ≥ 20
- Languages: English, Tiếng Việt

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/guide/getting-started): install + 5-minute tour
- [Choose the Right Model](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/guide/choose-the-right-model): which API for which use case
- [Mental Models](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/guide/mental-models): VIEW vs SNAPSHOT vs VAULT
- [Limitations](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/guide/limitations): honest constraints
- [FAQ](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/guide/faq): 10 common questions
- [API Overview](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/reference/api-overview): all 17 public APIs

## API Reference

### Freeze
- [freezeShallow](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/freeze/freeze-shallow): native Object.freeze, top-level only
- [deepFreeze](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/freeze/deep-freeze): recursive freeze with freezePrototypeChain opt-in

### View (Proxy-based)
- [immutableView](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/view/immutable-view): Proxy blocks mutations through this reference
- [immutableMapView](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/view/immutable-map-view): read-only Map wrapper
- [immutableSetView](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/view/immutable-set-view): read-only Set wrapper

### Snapshot (clone + freeze)
- [snapshot](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/snapshot/snapshot): independent frozen clone
- [lock](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/snapshot/lock): alias of snapshot
- [secureSnapshot](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/snapshot/secure-snapshot): null-prototype + accessor-throw hardening
- [tamperEvident](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/snapshot/tamper-evident): 64-bit djb2+sdbm fingerprint (NOT cryptographic)

### Isolation
- [vault](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/isolation/vault): closure + copy-on-read, no reference escape

### Verification
- [isDeepFrozen](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/verification/is-deep-frozen) / [assertDeepFrozen](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/verification/assert-deep-frozen)
- [isImmutableView](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/verification/is-immutable-view) / [assertImmutableView](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/verification/assert-immutable-view)
- [checkRuntimeIntegrity](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/verification/check-runtime-integrity): detect builtin tampering

## Recipes
- [Protect config](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/recipes/protect-config)
- [Protect API response](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/recipes/protect-api-response)

- [Choose snapshot vs vault](https://dunggramer.github.io/constancy/recipes/choose-between-snapshot-and-vault)
